tasks.title: Rate-limit watchdog + Telegram notification on rate-limit reset
tasks.notes: DONE 2026-05-16. Jasmin QA: PASS WITH NOTES (15/16 PASS, 1 cosmetic fixed). scripts/rate_limit_watchdog.py (~200 lines, stdlib). scripts/rl_restart.bat (python-only, no claude dependency, ASCII-only, safe for schtasks). WHAT IT DOES: on-stop fires when session ends — if five_hour.used_percentage >= 95%, sends Telegram ratelimit alert, writes queue file, schedules Windows Task ANDY_RL_RESTART to fire at reset epoch. Task fires rl_restart.bat → python on-start → sends Telegram restart notification + clears queue. IMPORTANT LIMITATION: system sends Telegram notification only — does NOT auto-start a new Claude session. Inon still opens Claude manually. When he does, on-start PreToolUse hook reads queue and resumes context. Fire-test v2: PASS (queue consumed, Telegram sent). KNOWN GAP: template expansion {{rate_limits.*}} in live rate-limit Stop hook unverified — diag log (scratchpad/watchdog_stop_log.json) captures on every session end. Check at next session start: 'python scripts/rate_limit_watchdog.py check'. Reports: agents/andy/inbox/mack_rate_limit_watchdog_done.md, agents/andy/inbox/jasmin_watchdog_qa.md.
